value.found_quote: Type `/rewind` (or `/undo`) to roll back your conversation thread to a previous stable checkout. ... Type `/fork` to spin up a duplicate parallel session. ... To automate quick queries or integrate agents into git hooks, use the one-shot prompt flag `-p`
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes all three components of the claimed session management capability: (1) rewinding via `/rewind` or `/undo` to roll back conversation history, (2) forking via `/fork` to spin up a duplicate parallel session, and (3) non-interactive execution via the `-p` one-shot prompt flag for automating commands in shell pipelines. All three features are documented as available functionality of the Antigravity CLI.
